The '''''Tharen Wayfarer''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned and operated by [[Kalarba Safari]], a [[Pitareeze family]] company. The family used the ship to take guests on the "[[Journey of the Spirit]]" tour, traveling over the [[Great Sea (Kalarba)|Great Sea]] and past the [[Three Peaks of Tharen]], [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba's]] symbol of the spirit.

The [[Indobok Pirates]], led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Huba]], captured the ''Tharen Wayfarer'', but [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[Nak Pitareeze]] managed to convince the pirates to return it, in exchange for the location of [[Olag Greck]]'s treasure trove and a [[Stenness pie]] recipe.

{{Ship-stub}}
